title: Deprecated GetNotificationOutput() method
description: Module implements GetNotificationOutput() which was removed in CMSMS 2.2. Use the Admin Alerts system instead.
explanation: GetNotificationOutput() was removed in CMSMS 2.2. The old notification system was replaced with the Admin Alerts classes (CmsAdminAlert).
fix: Remove GetNotificationOutput(). Use the Admin Alerts API: create a class extending CmsAdminAlert and register it.

examples.bad: function GetNotificationOutput() { return 'You have 3 pending items'; }
